description_long: This is a red, cylindrical CO2 fire extinguisher with a slightly weathered and scratched surface, indicating frequent use or exposure to urban environments. The extinguisher features a prominent black hose attached near the top, looping down and secured with a metal clamp. A silver metal handle and lever mechanism are mounted on the top, along with a visible safety pin and a small, round pressure gauge. The front of the extinguisher displays a large, white label with black and red text, providing usage instructions and warnings. The base is reinforced with a thicker ring, showing additional wear and scuff marks, and the overall construction appears robust and industrial.
description: A red, weathered CO2 fire extinguisher with a black hose, metal handle, safety pin, pressure gauge, and a large instructional label on the front.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is shown from a side angle, highlighting the black hose curving from the top and the metal handle, with part of the label visible.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the full length of the black hose running vertically down the back, with the handle and lever mechanism clearly visible.
description_view_2: This angle shows the back and side, focusing on the pressure gauge at the top and the hose attachment, with the label partially visible.
description_view_3: The front view prominently displays the large white label with usage instructions, as well as the handle and safety pin at the top.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large, rectangular white label with black and red text and symbols is present on the front of the cylinder, providing usage instructions and warnings.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black, flexible hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured with a clamp; the hose is medium length and made of rubber.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A small, round pressure gauge is visible at the top near the handle, with a metallic rim and a white face.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A silver safety pin is present at the top, inserted through the handle mechanism.
